summary: The content describes an API, named "Agent Skills," which allows users to search and read documentation related to agent skills using two main tools. The first tool, `search_agent_skills`, enables users to find relevant information and documentation by inputting queries. The second tool, `query_docs_filesystem_agent_skills`, allows users to execute read-only shell-like commands on a virtual documentation filesystem for exploring and retrieving documentation files. Additionally, there's a resource named "agent" aimed at supporting the creation and optimization of agent skills.
